title: AI, baseball, media, and markets — right now.
sections: Anthony, today is Thursday, July sixteenth.
AI infrastructure: Chipmakers and cloud providers continue increasing spending on data centers, processors, networking equipment, and power.
Enterprise AI: Businesses are prioritizing tools tied to measurable workflows over general-purpose chatbots.
Mets: The team is weighing roster help against preserving prospects and payroll flexibility.
Baseball: The quality of prospects included in trade talks will signal how aggressively the Mets intend to act.
Streaming: Major platforms are emphasizing subscriber retention over growth at any cost.
Media: Live sports, advertising tiers, and bundles are becoming the main tools for reducing cancellations.
Markets: Better-than-expected earnings are supporting stocks.
Energy: Higher oil prices are keeping inflation risk in focus.
